Operation 'likeActivity' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable, poor_ai_interpretability. The current summary and description are identical and overly simplistic, providing minimal guidance for AI agents. The improved version clarifies: (1) the specific action being performed (adding a like), (2) the required input (activity URN parameter), (3) the expected output (confirmation), (4) side effects (notifications, social action record creation), and (5) constraints (no duplicate likes). This enables AI agents to better understand when and how to use this operation, particularly regarding authentication requirements, parameter expectations, and the effects of the action.

data.summary_suggestion: Add like to a social activity
data.description_suggestion: Adds a like reaction to a specified social activity on behalf of the authenticated user. Requires the activity URN as a path parameter. Returns confirmation of the like action. This operation creates a social action record and may trigger notifications to the activity creator. The authenticated user cannot like the same activity twice.
data.reasoning: The current summary and description are identical and overly simplistic, providing minimal guidance for AI agents. The improved version clarifies: (1) the specific action being performed (adding a like), (2) the required input (activity URN parameter), (3) the expected output (confirmation), (4) side effects (notifications, social action record creation), and (5) constraints (no duplicate likes). This enables AI agents to better understand when and how to use this operation, particularly regarding authentication requirements, parameter expectations, and the effects of the action.

data.current_summary: Create a UGC (User Generated Content) post
data.current_description: Create a post on behalf of the authenticated member.
data.description_suggestion: Create a user-generated content (UGC) post on behalf of the authenticated member. Accepts a UgcPostCreate request body with post content and configuration. data.description_suggestion: Delete a user-generated content (UGC) post by its URN identifier. Requires the ugcPostUrn path parameter identifying the post to delete. Permanently removes the post from the member's profile and makes it inaccessible. Only the post creator can delete their own posts.
